heading: MongoDB Atlas
body:
This guide uses an Atlas [Service Account](service-accounts-overview) for
authentication. Service Accounts are the recommended authentication method for
programmatic access.

- [Sign in](https://account.mongodb.com/account/login) to or
  [create](https://account.mongodb.com/account/register) your MongoDB
  Atlas account.

- Set your Service Account credentials as environment variables:

  ```sh
  export MONGODB_ATLAS_CLIENT_ID="<your-client-id>"
  export MONGODB_ATLAS_CLIENT_SECRET="<your-client-secret>"
  ```

  > **Note:** Service Accounts are the recommended authentication method for programmatic access
  > with Terraform. For more information on setting up Service Accounts, see
  > [Grant Programmatic Access to an Organization](create-service-account-org).
